title: Crispy Stick Noodle Salad
description: A refreshing German-inspired salad with the crunch of crispy sticks and the flavor of intense sauce.
instructions: Cook the rice and noodles according to package instructions.
Chill the cooked rice and noodles in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the chilled rice and noodles.
Pour the intense sauce over the rice and noodles and toss to combine.
Add the crispy sticks on top of the salad and serve.
